invariant: MODES new-stream dispatch G1 — branch created LOCAL-ONLY; operator pushes when ready. A runner that auto-pushes to remote violates G1 (gate answer 2026-06-12, persisted D20 guarantee 6). No auto-push at any point in the new-stream path.
owning_role: prompts/_orchestrator.md MODES new-stream — create branch feature/<slug> off current HEAD (locally, do NOT push); write _streams/<slug>/brief.md; emit stop message; STOP.
seed: Apply defect: new-stream path adds git push origin feature/<slug> after branch creation
Run against scenario-new-stream state (dispatch arg: new-stream analytics-pipeline '...')
Expected: git push executed — branch visible on remote
load_bearing_assertion: Golden: branch created local-only (git branch feature/analytics-pipeline off HEAD; no git push). Defect: git push origin feature/analytics-pipeline executed. Value-parity fails: remote_push_performed == true vs golden false. G1 gate answer violated.
expected_verdict: value-parity FAIL — new-stream-auto-push: git push executed violating G1 local-only constraint
separates_from_golden_by: remote_push_performed flag. Golden: no push (local-only). Defect: push executed — any remote branch listing showing feature/analytics-pipeline = discrimination signal. G1 gate answer (LOCAL-ONLY) is the invariant.
